name: field-checkbox
visual_summary: A field-checkbox component is a two-part UI element commonly used in forms and registration processes. It consists of a checkbox and a label, often used to collect binary or boolean information from users. This component is ideal for adding a toggle option to sign-up forms or as a checkbox to select multiple options in a list.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: field-checkbox
Description: A field-checkbox component is a two-part UI element commonly used in forms and registration processes. It consists of a checkbox and a label, often used to collect binary or boolean information from users. This component is ideal for adding a toggle option to sign-up forms or as a checkbox to select multiple options in a list.
Style: 
Interactions: clickable
Tags: form component, checkbox, toggle, input

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
